nasb.text: Gaal spoke again and said, “Behold, people are coming down from the highest part of the land, and one company comes by the way of the diviners’ oak.”

esv.text: Gaal spoke again and said, “Look, people are coming down from the center of the land, and one company is coming from the direction of the Diviners’ Oak.”

cnv.text: 迦勒又說：“看哪，有人從高地下來，又有一隊從米惡尼尼橡樹的路徑而來。”

ccb.text: 迦勒说：“看！有人正从山上下来，还有一队人正从占卜橡树那边的路上奔来。”
